// src/suspense.ts var defaultThrowOnError = (_error, query) => query.state.data === void 0; var ensureSuspenseTimers = (defaultedOptions) => { if (defaultedOptions.suspense) { const MIN_SUSPENSE_TIME_MS = 1e3; const clamp = (value) => value === "static" ? value : Math.max(value ?? MIN_SUSPENSE_TIME_MS, MIN_SUSPENSE_TIME_MS); const originalStaleTime = defaultedOptions.staleTime; defaultedOptions.staleTime = typeof originalStaleTime === "function" ?
